## Theme Files

- [ ] I am attaching the `.theme.json` file
- [ ] I am attaching the background image (if applicable) — max 10 MB, JPG/PNG/WebP/GIF/AVIF only
- [ ] The ZIP is correctly structured (`name.theme.json` + optional `cover.jpg/png/webp`)

<!-- Attach your files below -->

---

## Checklist

- [ ] The theme follows the official `.theme.json` format (see [template](https://github.com/MasterAcnolo/Freedom-Loader/blob/main/theme/template.theme.json))
- [ ] All required fields in `meta` are filled (`name`, `author`, `version`, `formatVersion`, `subtitle`)
- [ ] All required color fields are filled (no empty strings on mandatory keys)
- [ ] The theme has been tested locally in Freedom Loader
- [ ] The preview screenshot clearly shows the theme applied on the app
- [ ] The background image (if any) is under 10 MB

---
